summary: MANUTRIX Iteration 9 - Executive Dashboard Testing Complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All dashboard features verified working including 3 KPI blocks, 2 charts, drill-down modals, export dropdown, and sidebar navigation regression.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - recharts ResponsiveContainer warning during initial render, but charts display correctly after load

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful
Backend: GET /api/kpis returns all required fields (disponibilidade_percent, backlog_total, mtbf_horas, mttr_horas, preventivas_percent, corretivas_percent)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns OS data (abertas, em_execucao, por_tipo, por_prioridade)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns inspeções data (pendentes, nao_conformes_mes)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns estoque data (criticos)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/trend returns 6 months of data
Backend: Dashboard trend has MTBF/MTTR for line chart
Backend: Dashboard trend has OS breakdown by type
Backend: GET /api/ordens-servico/backlog returns backlog data for drill-down
Backend: GET /api/ordens-servico returns OS list for drill-down filtering
Backend: GET /api/estoque returns estoque list for drill-down filtering
Backend: GET /api/inspecoes returns inspeções list for drill-down filtering
Backend: GET /api/export/ordens-servico?format=excel returns file
Backend: GET /api/export/ativos?format=excel returns file
Backend: Regression - GET /api/ativos works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/ordens-servico works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/inspecoes works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/estoque works
Frontend: Dashboard title 'Dashboard Operacional' visible
Frontend: Dashboard subtitle 'Indicadores operacionais e de confiabilidade da planta' visible
Frontend: Block 1 - Visão Executiva: Disponibilidade (88.9%), Backlog (21), OS Abertas (20), Ordens Críticas (4) visible with large numbers
Frontend: Block 2 - Performance: MTBF (640h), MTTR (0h), Preventiva vs Corretiva (0%/100%) visible
Frontend: Block 3 - Risco Operacional: Estoque Crítico (12), Inspeções Pendentes (8), Não Conformidades (3) visible
Frontend: Color coding working - green for good values, amber for warning, red for critical
Frontend: Tendência MTBF/MTTR line chart renders with 6 months data (Nov-Abr)
Frontend: Distribuição de OS bar chart renders with Corretiva, Preventiva, Preditiva, Emergência bars
Frontend: Drill-down - Click Backlog card opens modal with list of open OS
Frontend: Drill-down modal shows OS number, asset tag, priority badge, status badge
Frontend: Export dropdown shows on hover with Excel/CSV options (OS, Ativos, Inspeções, Estoque)
Frontend: Regression - Sidebar navigation to Ativos page works
Frontend: Regression - Sidebar navigation to Ordens de Serviço page works
Frontend: Regression - Sidebar navigation to Inspeções page works
Frontend: Regression - Sidebar navigation to Estoque page works
Frontend: Regression - Return to Dashboard works

new_features_verified.description: Block 1 (Visão Executiva): Disponibilidade, Backlog, OS Abertas, Ordens Críticas. Block 2 (Performance): MTBF, MTTR, Preventiva vs Corretiva. Block 3 (Risco Operacional): Estoque Crítico, Inspeções Pendentes, Não Conformidades
KPI values displayed in large font (text-4xl font-black) with color coding: green (emerald) for good, amber for warning, red for critical based on thresholds
Recharts LineChart showing 6 months of MTBF (green) and MTTR (red) trend data with tooltip
Recharts BarChart showing OS count by type (Corretiva, Preventiva, Preditiva, Emergência) with clickable bars
Clicking KPI cards opens modal with filtered data list (Backlog shows open OS, Ordens Críticas shows critical OS only, Estoque Crítico shows low stock items)
Hover on 'Exportar Dados' button shows dropdown with Excel/CSV options for OS, Ativos, Inspeções, Estoque
Dashboard uses dark slate background with emerald/amber/red accent colors for industrial look

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warning from recharts about chart dimensions during initial render - charts work correctly after load, but could add minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer to suppress warning
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Dashboard shows real data: 18 ativos, 21 backlog OS, 4 critical OS, 12 critical stock items, 8 pending inspections.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executive dashboard fully implemented and tested. 3 KPI blocks (Visão Executiva, Performance, Risco Operacional) with large numbers and color coding. 2 charts (MTBF/MTTR trend line, OS distribution bars) using recharts. Drill-down modals open on KPI card click. Export dropdown on hover. All data-testids in place: dashboard-title, kpi-disponibilidade, kpi-backlog, kpi-os-abertas, kpi-os-criticas, kpi-mtbf, kpi-mttr, kpi-prev-corr, kpi-estoque-critico, kpi-insp-pendentes, kpi-nao-conformes, chart-trend, chart-os-dist, export-data-btn. Sidebar navigation regression tests passing.
